description: Gang Shi Acupuncture was founded in 1994 with a simple mission: to provide accessible, high-quality Traditional Chinese Medicine care to the New York community.
What started as a small practice has grown into a trusted wellness center, helping over 1,000 patients achieve better health naturally.
clinic.environment: Our clinic provides a peaceful, welcoming environment designed to promote relaxation and healing. From the moment you enter, you'll feel the difference - calming colors, comfortable treatment rooms, and a warm, friendly atmosphere that puts patients at ease.

journey.story:
Gang Shi Acupuncture was founded in 1994 with a simple yet profound mission: to bring the ancient wisdom of Traditional Chinese Medicine to the Great Neck community. What began as a small practice has grown into a trusted healing sanctuary where East meets West, offering hope and restoration to countless individuals seeking natural alternatives to their health challenges.

For thirty years, our clinic has remained rooted in the timeless principles of TCM while adapting to serve the diverse needs of Long Island families. We've witnessed remarkable transformations—from chronic pain sufferers finding relief through acupuncture to anxious patients discovering inner peace through our holistic approach. Each success story strengthens our commitment to preserving these ancient healing arts.

Today, Gang Shi Acupuncture stands as a beacon of authentic traditional medicine in Great Neck, where every patient receives personalized care that honors both their unique constitution and the profound healing wisdom passed down through generations of Chinese medicine masters.
journey.title: My Journey to Chinese Medicine

profile.bio:
Dr. Gang Shi's journey into Traditional Chinese Medicine began over three decades ago, driven by a deep reverence for the profound healing wisdom of his ancestors. After earning his Master of Science in Traditional Chinese Medicine from the American College of Traditional Chinese Medicine in San Francisco, he became board-certified by the National Certification Commission for Acupuncture and Oriental Medicine (NCCAOM), establishing himself as a trusted practitioner in the field.

With 32 years of clinical experience, Dr. Gang Shi has developed particular expertise in treating complex conditions including chronic pain management, anxiety and panic disorders, women's health issues, respiratory conditions, and immune system imbalances. His approach seamlessly weaves together multiple modalities—acupuncture, Chinese herbal medicine, cupping, moxibustion, and Tuina massage—creating individualized treatment protocols that address not just symptoms, but the root energetic imbalances within each patient.

Dr. Gang Shi believes that true healing occurs when we work in harmony with the body's innate wisdom rather than against it. Fluent in both English and Chinese, he serves as a bridge between ancient Eastern healing traditions and modern wellness needs, guiding each patient toward optimal health through the gentle yet powerful principles of qi cultivation, meridian balance, and constitutional harmony.
profile.name: Dr. Gang Shi
profile.quote: The body holds infinite wisdom to heal itself when we simply provide the right conditions for balance to flourish.
profile.title: L.Ac., NCCAOM

philosophy.title: Treatment Philosophy

principles.title: Treat the Whole Person
principles.description: TCM recognizes that physical symptoms are often connected to emotional, mental, and spiritual factors. Dr. Gang Shi addresses all aspects of health, not just isolated symptoms.

principles.title: Find the Root Cause
principles.description: Rather than merely suppressing symptoms, treatment focuses on identifying and addressing the underlying imbalances that create disease. This approach leads to lasting results.

principles.title: Personalized Care
principles.description: No two patients are alike. Each treatment plan is carefully customized based on your unique constitution, health history, and current condition.

principles.title: Patient Education
principles.description: Understanding your body and condition empowers you to take an active role in your healing. Dr. Gang Shi takes time to explain your diagnosis and treatment in clear, accessible terms.

principles.title: Integration with Western Medicine
principles.description: TCM can work beautifully alongside conventional medical care. Dr. Gang Shi collaborates with other healthcare providers to ensure comprehensive, coordinated treatment.

principles.title: Prevention & Wellness
principles.description: The best medicine prevents illness before it occurs. Treatment includes guidance on diet, lifestyle, and self-care practices to maintain long-term health.

philosophy.introduction: Dr. Gang Shi's approach to healing is rooted in the fundamental principles of Traditional Chinese Medicine while incorporating modern clinical understanding.

specializations.title: Areas of Specialization
specializations.description: Through years of clinical practice and continuing education, Dr. Gang Shi has developed particular expertise in several key areas:

items: Classical Chinese Herbal Medicine seminars with Dr. Heiner Fruehauf
Annual attendance at national TCM conferences
Regular study groups with local TCM practitioners
30+ hours of continuing education annually (required: 30 hours every 3 years)
